name: 2941 Restaurant

notes: Every frozen row was reconciled against the current official à-la-carte, prix-fixe, Chef's July tasting, cocktail, and zero-proof menus.
Twenty-two frozen rows remain exact current items, two are current renamed variants, and Appalachian from Meadow Creek is absent from all current official menus.
The corrected represented surface contains 51 current official items, adding 27 current food and beverage items that the frozen catalog omitted.
2941 does not publish a complete allergen matrix; no allergen absence or general cross-contact safety claim is made.

The frozen app labeled every item unavailable even where official descriptions explicitly name allergens such as milk cheeses, egg, soy/shoyu/miso, fish, shellfish, nuts, bread, pasta, tempura, and aioli.

The corrected catalog has 35 direct item-text signal rows and 16 accurately unavailable rows; quoted matsutake-shoyu caviar and oyster mushrooms are explicitly protected from false fish/shellfish classification.
The frozen parser extracted only the à-la-carte surface and then discarded every allergen signal despite preserving detailed official ingredient descriptions.
It retained one stale seasonal cheese, missed two current cheeses and East Coast Oysters, and did not represent current prix-fixe, July tasting, cocktail, or zero-proof offerings.
The correction uses restaurant-issued current menu text and conservative direct-term classification without converting missing disclosures into negative claims.

findings.summary: Twenty-two of 24 current frozen rows had explicit official allergen terms but were shown with allergen data unavailable.
findings.resolution: Rebuilt positive signals from explicit current official item text while leaving all undisclosed allergens unavailable.

findings.summary: The frozen catalog retained one stale cheese and omitted 27 current items across the à-la-carte, prix-fixe, tasting, cocktail, and zero-proof menus.
findings.resolution: Replaced the frozen 25-row surface with a deduplicated 51-item current official catalog and placed beverages last.

findings.summary: Naive term matching would incorrectly classify oyster mushrooms as shellfish and matsutake-shoyu 'caviar' as fish.
findings.resolution: Added focused exclusions with regression assertions while retaining true East Coast Oysters and Kaviari Baenki Caviar signals.

repairs.summary: Prepared and targeted-tested a 51-item current official snapshot covering every active public menu surface with beverages last and conservative direct allergen signals.
verificationCommands: RESTAURANT_REPOSITORY_PATH=tmp/restaurant-verification/2941-repair-input.json node scripts/repair-final-generated-regressions.mjs (targeted copy; verified 51 unique items, 15 real sections, 35 direct rows, 16 unavailable rows, culinary false-positive exclusions, and beverages last)

notes: The Chef's tasting page explicitly identifies itself as the July menu and offers two choices in each of five courses.
Focused catalog, full frozen-row reconciliation, targeted repair-copy, unique-id, section-order, source-authority, and culinary false-positive checks passed.
